import sys, os, time
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
import win32com.client

DBC      = r'C:\\Users\\이준영\\CANoe-IVI-OTA\\canoe\\databases\\emergency_system.dbc'
SYSVARS  = r'C:\\Users\\이준영\\CANoe-IVI-OTA\\canoe\\cfg\\project.sysvars'
NODES_DIR= r'C:\\Users\\이준영\\CANoe-IVI-OTA\\canoe\\nodes'
NODES    = ['Context_Manager','Police_Node','Ambulance_Node','Civ_Node','Ambient_ECU','Cluster_ECU']

app = win32com.client.Dispatch\('CANoe.Application'\)
print\('[OK] 연결:', app.Name\)

cfg = app.Configuration
sim = cfg.SimulationSetup

# 버스 구조 파악
busses = sim.Busses
print\(f'버스 수: {busses.Count}'\)
for i in range\(1, busses.Count+1\):
    b = busses.Item\(i\)
    print\(f'  버스[{i}] Name={b.Name}  DB={b.Databases.Count}  Nodes={b.Nodes.Count}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/이준영/CANoe-IVI-OTA" && "C:/Users/이준영/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python311/python.exe" -c "
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
import win32com.client

app = win32com.client.Dispatch\('CANoe.Application'\)
cfg = app.Configuration
sim = cfg.SimulationSetup
buses = sim.Buses
target = buses.Item\(1\)
nds = target.Nodes
node = nds.Item\(1\)

# INode 속성 모두 출력
print\('INode 타입:', type\(node\)\)
print\('dir\(node\):'\)
attrs = [a for a in dir\(node\) if not a.startswith\('_'\)]
for a in attrs:
    print\(f'  {a}'\)

# cfg 속성 확인
print\(\)
print\('IConfiguration 속성:'\)
attrs2 = [a for a in dir\(cfg\) if not a.startswith\('_'\)]
for a in attrs2:
    print\(f'  {a}'\)
" 2>&1)
